title: Inside Traitor
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller, Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: When the public turns against you, what options do you have? As Emma Pepper and her squad continue hunting down the Silencer, they begin to discover secrets that could completely derail the case. Who is the Silencer? Why did he kill who he killed? And is there more to the story than the police know? The more they study the Silencer, the clearer it becomes that not only is the squad dealing with a serial killer, they are dealing with a pro. He continues to evade forensic evidence and hide from the police in this police procedural series, but that’s not all that Emma has to deal with. Hiding under the prying eyes of her bosses, the squad and Emma feel like they’re being rushed to find the Silencer - or they may lose their jobs. Things only take a turn for the worse when a story breaks on the local news and the Silencer becomes a local hero, not a villain. What can the police do now that the public doesn’t want the Silence behind bars? Who leaked the story? And in the midst of all the drama, can Emma somehow find a way to uncover who the Silencer is before he silences her?
#motivo_ia: Continúa la caza del Silencer; presión pública y secretos internos.

title: Caught in the Crosshairs
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller, Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: With her reputation on the line, Detective Pepper has nowhere to turn… As Detective Emma Pepper struggles to clear her name, all eyes are on her. All of her friends think that she betrayed all of them, and even Emma has to admit that they’ve got a point. When the press gets wind of these secrets, things only get worse… But who told the press? In this police mystery, Emma is suddenly in the crosshairs. With the Silencer still free on the streets, and questions at every corner, Emma realizes she’s in danger. No one believes her, and she is stuck carrying the weight of secrets she never intended to keep. But now, she feels like she’s being watched. Who’s watching? Do they want her dead, or do they want her help? Will Emma be able to survive the mountain of secrets she is falling into, or will it swallow her whole?
#motivo_ia: Policiaco/thriller con detective persiguiendo a un asesino en serie, sin romance central ni elementos fantásticos.

title: Hunt Down
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller, Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: Emma Pepper loves her job. As an NYPD detective, she has her eyes set on rising up in her career. She knows she can do it, and she knows she’s good at it. Being a good detective comes easy to her… but it seems catching the infamous serial killer, The Silencer, gives her pause. As the infamous killer continues to evade the police, Emma’s boss calls in help from the small-town police force, now known for stopping a bad cop named Andrew. Now, Emma is feeling a little crowded with the new cops crowding her space. However, she knows better than anyone with this killer, they need all the help that they can get. But, as clues and secrets start piling up, the serial killer seems to be the farthest thing from what they expected. It seems that suddenly, The Silencer is out for blood, and the police are running out of time before he strikes again. In this police thriller, follow in the steps of Emma Pepper and Harper Storm as they hunt down another bad man - hopefully before he hunts them.
#motivo_ia: Emma Pepper y Harper Storm colaboran contra el asesino en serie Silencer; thriller policiaco.

title: Chasing Memories
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller, Representacion · Protagonista femenina fuerte, Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: After chasing down who she was sure was the Shadow Man, Harper Storm finds herself face to face with the harsh reality of the world of cold cases. Injuries, crazy truths, and the idea that someone within the precinct might be hurting the case begin to unveil and threaten to tear Harper’s world apart. That is until she’s forced to reveal a horribly painful truth to everyone she knows… One that could cost her the case.  B.P Stevens kidnapping thrillers are perfect if you are trying to find police books with conclusions you didn't see coming!
#motivo_ia: Thriller policíaco con Harper Storm y el caso del Shadow Man, secuestro de niños.

title: Dead Man Walking
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: Detective Mike O’Connor is a grizzled veteran of the force who has seen it all and wouldn’t admit to having any soft spots. But he wasn’t prepared for his former partner to become the victim of a psychotic stalker. He will have to keep his emotions separate from his work, because what begins as a stalking case will rapidly turn into something far bigger, and more sinister, than anyone could have expected.
#motivo_ia: El detective O'Connor investiga un caso de acoso que deriva en algo más siniestro.

title: Cold Blooded
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: Everybody has got a past. Some people hope others will never find out about it. Some people would kill to do so. It's up to inspectors Murray and Burns to bring them to justice.
#motivo_ia: Los inspectores Murray y Burns investigan un asesinato vinculado a secretos del pasado.

title: Vile Experiment
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments:
DCI Kirk Ross is first on the scene of a body found in the woods with surgical wounds and hideous, infected stitching.   
The grim possibilities are endless: organ harvesting scheme? Unlicensed surgeon? A serial killer with a penchant for torture?  
If Ross can’t crack the case, the bodies will pile up and the DCI may find himself the last victim.
#motivo_ia: DCI Kirk Ross investigates body with surgical wounds; serial killer elements. Part of a series.

title: Fatal Mercy
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: The local police have asked retired spy Ian Forsyth to help investigate a series of deaths at a private cancer hospital, and he is more than happy to use his peculiar set of skills to do it.But what seemingly starts out as an investigation into a rogue doctor quickly becomes a conspiracy involving the most powerful members of society and international corporations bent on exploiting the most vulnerable.A conspiracy big enough to commit murder to keep secret.
#motivo_ia: Exespía investiga muertes en un hospital oncológico; conspiración corporativa.

title: Cultish Following
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: Maisie Kirkwood left her parents’ home two years ago and hasn’t been seen since. Now, a homeless man has been found with the missing girl’s backpack and ID. His story will send Inspector Glenn Finlay on a race across Scotland, from the hustle and bustle of modern Edinburgh to a mysterious building deep in the forested highlands. It’s up to Scotland’s best detective to follow the trail of the missing girl and unravel the clues that will unmask a dark truth that has been buried for far too long.
#motivo_ia: Inspector Glenn Finlay sigue la pista de una joven desaparecida; misterio con trasfondo de secta.

title: Blue Vengeance
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments:
When the Chief Constable is found dead, everyone looks to DCI Logan Thorne to solve the case. But once he finds a taunting message from the killer with the threat to strike again, there is only one a serial cop killer is on the loose.   
Will Thorne find him before he strikes again?   
Or is Thorne the next victim?
#motivo_ia: Jefe de policía asesinado, asesino en serie de policías; thriller detectivesco.

title: Dark Obsession
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments:
DCI Sean Argyle has the unenviable task of catching a serial killer, and all the evidence points to a suspect thousands of miles away.   
Common sense would indicate that there is another suspect, or that the killer has an accomplice, but Argyle is more worried by an even more bone-chilling possibility.   
What if the real killer is indeed thousands of miles away? And worse, how do you stop him?
#motivo_ia: Caza de un asesino en serie con pistas que apuntan a un sospechoso lejano; thriller policiaco.

title: Blood on the Harbour
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: A strange murder. An abducted family. A case with no leads. Murder Investigation Specialist Alasdair Abernathy has to cut through the fog, figuratively and literally, to save a family before they are murdered to settle an unknown vendetta. Or he might become the next victim.
#motivo_ia: Asesinato extraño y familia secuestrada; thriller policiaco con niebla.

title: A Family Affair
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: Blood runs thicker than water, but it still runs. When Inspector Glenn Finlay responds to the scene of the murder of a wealthy patriarch, he quickly realizes that what looked like a palatial estate was in fact a den of vipers. Everyone is a suspect, everyone has a motive, and only Scotland’s best detective can crack the case before the killer covers their tracks… or strikes again.
#motivo_ia: Inspector investiga asesinato de un patriarca; thriller policiaco en Escocia.

title: Death Behind Silent Walls
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller
comments: After her husband dies under suspicious circumstances, Victoria Sedgewick is drawn down a dark and spiraling path of family secrets. There, she uncovers a deception so deep it threatens to destroy everything she holds dear.  Will the private inquiry agent investigating her husband’s murder complicate matters? Or might Mr. Branwell Keats prove to be an ally, as a growing shadow of danger looms over Victoria’s household?
#motivo_ia: Continuación del misterio victoriano de Victoria Sedgewick.

title: A Drink of Death
tags: Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: **When tea and death mix ...** Maddie Morgan hasn't had long to recover from a recent murder investigation and to settle back into running her new tea garden, when disaster strikes again. Like most catastrophes, this one involves Mamma Jackie and her crazed old parrot. With the clock ticking down and time running out, can Maddie save Mamma Jackie from the clutches of a fiendish villain? Or will the mysteries of her ex-mother-in-law's disappearance and Maddie's strange discovery of a lucky cat statue be doomed to remain unsolved forever?
#motivo_ia: Otro cozy mystery de Maddie Morgan con el jardín de té.

title: A Simple Country Murder
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller
comments: **Murder. Spies. Treason. Shadowy secrets lurk beneath the surface of an idyllic country village...** When Helen Lightholder’s world is shattered by the death of her husband during the London Blitz, she escapes to the countryside, hoping to leave the war behind her. But managing an inherited property in a quaint Gloucestershire village turns out to be more perilous than she expects. Cozy little Brookminster isn’t the peaceful haven Helen dreamed of, and it isn’t long before she discovers that, even here, dark threats and dangerous secrets await. As family duty compels her to meddle in a police investigation into the suspicious death of a relative, she finds herself at odds with the local inspector. Can Helen bring justice to her little corner of the country, while war rages on in the greater world outside? Or will her investigation make her the next target of a fiendish killer who has everything to lose?
#motivo_ia: Mismo estilo y protagonista, misterio rural.

title: A Simple Country Funeral
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller
comments: **Death returns to the country ...** A quiet country life continues to elude Helen Lightholder, as she wrestles with her recent bereavement. When the grisly murder of a nameless vagabond shocks the local community, Helen sets out to unearth the truth behind the inexplicable killing. But Bookminster hides secrets almost as old as it’s 14th century market place, and the village’s inhabitants will do anything to thwart a prying outsider. Helen’s snooping at a convalescent home for wounded soldiers leads to an apparent dead end, even as other obstacles loom in her path. With Inspector Graves blocking her investigation at every turn and a mysterious, shadowy figure continuing to dog her steps, can Helen unmask the most dangerous killer she has ever faced?
#motivo_ia: Misterio cozy ambientado en un pueblo durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

title: A Taste of Trickery
tags: Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: **When tea tastes like danger ...** Maddie’s difficult ex-mother-in-law and her crazed old parrot are at it again, stirring up new drama in the Morgan household. Maddie has no sooner resolved the last crises involving her family, than a new problem arrives in the form of a dangerous business rival determined to shut down her tea garden. To make matters worse, a severed hand has just been found in the tea garden and no one seems to know where it’s come from! Can Maddie discover the truth and unravel an old crime before the perpetrator gets close enough to end her investigation permanently? Or has Maddie Morgan donned her detective hat and her gardening gloves for the last time?
#motivo_ia: Continúa la serie cozy mystery de Maddie.

title: A Sip of Murder
tags: Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: **When tea and murder make a bitter brew ...** Maddie Morgan’s life is going up in flames. She’s got ex-husband troubles, a mother-in-law feud, and a cantankerous parrot to contend with. But just as old doors close, a new one opens, beginning with the sudden death of Maddie’s grandmother and an unexpected inheritance. Moving to a new town, Maddie rolls up her sleeves and prepares to revive a run-down tourist attraction that could one day be returned to its former glory as a Japanese tea garden. But getting the tea garden up and running won’t be easy, not with someone trying to sabotage her efforts. Worse still, there’s a murderer on the loose and corpses are popping up like daisies in the tea garden! Can Maddie capture the killer before they strike again? Or will her life, along with her freshly brewed new business opportunity, get sucked down the drain?
#motivo_ia: Cozy mystery con jardín de té, sin elementos sobrenaturales.

title: A Simple Country Mystery
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller
comments: **Death comes unexpectedly ...** With the suspicious death of a young woman in the village, Helen Lightholder finds herself once again delving into the menacing shadows that lurk beneath the pleasant surface of sunny Bookminster. Her search for suspects and motives leads her to a prisoner of war camp on the outskirts of the village, but could the real danger lie even closer to home?  Meanwhile, two very different men vie for Helen’s heart, but neither can take the place of the husband she lost. As a series of break-ins leave her feeling unsafe in her home and shop, Helen has to decide whether or not to continue in the “quiet” life she has found in the country.
#motivo_ia: Continúa las investigaciones de Helen Lightholder.

title: Killing the Pretty Ones
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: After a series of attractive young women are brutally murdered, DCI Mike O’Connor sets his sights on tracking down the perpetrator. Once he determines the link between the victims is the shady world of online escort services, he will have his hands full convincing an American corporation to release the confidential client information he needs to crack the case before the modern day Ripper can strike again.
#motivo_ia: Jóvenes asesinadas vinculadas a servicios de acompañantes; caza de un asesino en serie.

title: Murder and Privlege
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: In the picturesque town of St Andrews, the heir to the famous Lacteus family fortune has been found dead in the estate swimming pool. The local police quickly determine that it wasn’t an accident, and DCI Argyle and Inspector McFayden are called in to investigate. Scotland’s best detectives will have to unravel a tangled family history and the damaged relationships between the surviving members of the Lacteus clan if they hope to catch a killer intent on destroying the family’s empire.
#motivo_ia: Muerte del heredero de una fortuna; investigación de una familia adinerada.

title: Killing Lady Macbeth
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: When the actress playing Lady MacBeth is savagely murdered just offstage during the play, all the eyes of Inverness are turned toward DCI Argyle as he attempts to bring the killer to justice.    The murder is just the tip of the iceberg as Sean and Edel uncover the depths of a conspiracy by one of the oldest secret societies in Scotland.    If they pry too far into long-hidden mysteries, the inspectors may find themselves the next victims.
#motivo_ia: Actriz asesinada durante una obra; investigación que involucra una sociedad secreta.

title: Burn the Witch
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: Some superstition is harmless, some superstition is just good fun, but some superstitions are deadly serious.    When two occult related murders rock the highlands, DCI Mike O’Connor will find that the clues to each lead in the same direction: a circle of evil that will stop at nothing to protect itself.
#motivo_ia: Novela policiaca centrada en un asesinato relacionado con el ocultismo, sin elementos sobrenaturales reales ni romance central.

title: Running Bones
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: Detective Alasdair Abernathy is called in to assist with a missing person case where nothing is what it seems. A well-loved community member disappeared during his daily run, and no shortage suspects are competing with each other to… confess to his murder? It won’t be easy to cut through the web of lies, betrayal, and deceit in order to crack this case, but if he doesn’t, a killer will remain at large among us.
#motivo_ia: Persona desaparecida durante su carrera; múltiples confesiones falsas.

title: Hunting a Monster
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: When Edinburgh is rocked by a murder so violent and gruesome that it appears to be the work of gang of perpetrators, DCI Logan Thorne is called in to begin the hunt.  But what if the killer is operating alone? Does one man have the titanic strength needed to kill two others at the same with only his bare hands?  What if Logan isn’t trying to catch a man at all?  What if a monster roams the streets of Edinburgh at night?
#motivo_ia: Asesinato brutal en Edimburgo; posible asesino en serie con fuerza sobrehumana, pero sin sobrenatural.

title: Dirge for the Girl
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: A young woman is missing on the Isle of Skye. The locals believe she has run away, but Logan’s not so sure. When a body is found, the finger pointing begins. Was it the jealous ex-boyfriend, the angry step-father, or somebody no one’s even considered yet?  Things are made more difficult by a local constabulary that’s leery of outsiders and a nosy writer hoping for an inside scoop for his next novel. It’s up to DCI Thorne and DI Harding to unearth the dark secrets of a small town and unravel the mystery of a teen-ager’s death before the killer selects his next victim.
#motivo_ia: Desaparición y asesinato en la Isla de Skye; misterio rural con múltiples sospechosos.

title: Spying on the Killer
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: Retired MI5 agent Ian Forsyth wanted nothing more than to peacefully enjoy his newfound freedom, but his relaxation is interrupted by the suicide of a friend’s child.    Suspicious at the circumstances and rebuffed by the police, Ian is forced to take the investigation into his own hand.    But as he pulls on the thread, he will find something deeper and darker than he could have ever foreseen, and it will take all his skills as a former clandestine spy to expose the truth and obtain justice.
#motivo_ia: Retired MI5 agent investigates suspicious suicide; no romance, no fantasy/sci-fi. Clear mystery/thriller.

title: Scorched Bones
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: A homicidal arson. A mysterious body. An affair of the heart.    DCI Murray and Sergeant Burns have to solve a horrific crime where the obvious motives don’t match the few clues available.    If they do not, a murderer with no qualms about burning an innocent family to death will strike again.
#motivo_ia: Incendio provocado con víctimas; investigación de un pirómano asesino.

title: Murder on the North Sea
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: DCI O’Connor is enjoying a rare day off when his partner calls with a request. A dead body has been found in the kitchen of the cruise ship she’s on, but with half of Edinburgh trying to escape the summer’s heat, it will be hours before the officer on duty arrives. And time is ticking away, as the police can only keep the ship in the harbor for twenty-four hours while they hunt for the killer. But who among this boatload of strangers would want to kill the beautiful Italian with the unquenchable need for sex?
#motivo_ia: Asesinato en un crucero; la víctima tenía una vida sexual activa, pero el foco es el misterio.

title: Channeling the Dead
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: An occult seance.    A gruesome death.    Disappeared children.  DCI Argyle is called to the picturesque holiday town of St. Monans to investigate a strange death, but when there are no obvious signs of foul play, his superiors want to close the case. But Argyle will have to fight to keep the case open, since the small town is about to be torn apart by a modern day witch-hunt. If he doesn’t put the pieces together in time, there will be a bloodbath in the seaside village.
#motivo_ia: Investigación de una muerte en una sesión de espiritismo, pero sin magia real; misterio policiaco.

title: Wicked Past
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: A woman has gone missing, and after a week with no progress, DCI Fletcher and Sgt. Burns have been asked to lend a hand. No one is surprised when the woman’s body is found, but then a second woman disappears, quickly followed by a third. The disappearances are eerily similar to an unsolved case from five years ago, but the main suspect is long dead.  Murray and Burns find themselves on the trail of a ghost as they hunt a murderer with an unquenchable need to kill.
#motivo_ia: DCI Fletcher and Sgt. Burns investigate missing women linked to unsolved case; police procedural.

title: Wicked Hunter
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: A killer with a penchant for removing organs has Glasgow wracked with terror, and DCI Kirk Ross is tasked with capturing him.  Kirk is prepared to risk everything to capture such a hideous evil, but it may not be in time before he gets his last victim and he enacts his devious master plan.
#motivo_ia: Same detective hunting an organ-removing serial killer; consistent with series.

title: Buried Sins
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: DCI Sean Argyle is called into a small mining town to investigate suspicious murders at a care home, but the dark secrets he uncovers threaten to tear apart the village.  To catch a killer, Sean will have to dig up the hideous past; a past that even the innocents in the town would prefer to keep buried.
#motivo_ia: Asesinatos en residencia de ancianos en pueblo minero; thriller con secretos oscuros.

title: Memories of Death
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: A life or death situation, with only faulty memories as clues.   A bloodied and tortured young woman has escaped her captor and made it to safety, and DCI Logan Thorne is tasked with bringing in the culprit.   Unfortunately, the victim has no memory of who she is, or how she got captured. But she does remember one detail: there is another woman being held captive, and Logan will have to act quickly to save her.   Can he?
#motivo_ia: Mujer torturada sin memoria; carrera contra el tiempo para rescatar a otra cautiva.

title: On the Run
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller, Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: **With the clock running out, can Emma Pepper prove she’s being framed, or will she go down for a crime she didn’t commit?** As her entire life in the NYPD comes to a screeching halt, Emma finds herself in the center of this small town thriller. After someone breaks into her home, leaving a single rose in their wake, Emma finds herself utterly alone with only twenty four hours to discover evidence to prove her innocence.  As Emma scrambles to figure out the truth, she begins to uncover a deeper cover up than ever before. How far does this go? Who else is involved? And even worse, to what lengths would the people involved go to ensure that their secrets stay buried? In this police procedural thriller, Emma races against the clock and finds herself drawing ever nearer to finding out who the Silencer is…  Before they silence her.
#motivo_ia: Emma Pepper acusada, 24 horas para probar inocencia; thriller policiaco con el Silencer.

title: Sinister Secrets
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: When a drag queen is murdered in a seedy Glasgow nightclub, all signs point to a drug deal gone wrong.    But DCI Kirk Ross suspects something far more sinister.    Does a serial killer stalk in the shadows?
#motivo_ia: Asesinato de una drag queen en un club; posible asesino en serie acechando.

title: The Arran Killing
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: The Island of Arran is a remote, rugged, and beautiful place, but the windswept grandeur is marred by the murder of a member of a tourist group.    When he discovers that the uncooperative local police would prefer to sweep it under the rug, Inspector Glenn Finlay will find out just how remote-- and dangerous-- Arran can be as he tries to bring a killer to justice.    Lies. Infidelity. Secret pasts.    Murder.
#motivo_ia: Inspector investigates murder on island; straightforward police mystery.

title: Legacy of the Butcher
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: DCI Logan Thorne is forced to reopen a cold case that has tormented Police Scotland for thirteen years when a young woman is found murdered in a similar pattern.    Logan has to do the impossible, do what his predecessor couldn’t: catch the Butcher of Holyrood.    Old wounds. Fresh blood. Terror.
#motivo_ia: Caso frío reabierto; asesino en serie apodado 'El Carnicero de Holyrood'.

title: Hunting the Reaper
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: For a tiny rural farming village, a single murder would leave scars for decades. But when several women are killed in a short amount of time, the local police are in over their head, and a killer is roaming free.  Inspector Alasdair Abernathy and his cunning protégé Elspeth are called in to catch the Reaper before he strikes again, but if they don’t act quickly, they may find themselves in the killer’s sight.
#motivo_ia: Múltiples mujeres asesinadas en un pueblo rural; el inspector Abernathy persigue al 'Segador'.

title: Hounds & Hares
tags: Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: A playing card with Odin’s Cross is left at the scene of the murder of a young boy.The only clue to a horrid crime.Can DCI Ross and Deputy Rose use this scant lead to find the killer before he strikes again? What if they are the next victims?
#motivo_ia: Un niño asesinado y una carta con un símbolo; investigación policiaca.

title: Point of No Return
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller
comments: When Mason Carter decided to seek justice for his sister, he had no idea what was in store for him.   For as long as everyone could remember, Mason has been the most reckless sibling of the Carter family. But this time, his irresponsibility finally landed him at the point of no return. After a long, intoxicated night out, his little sister is left to escort him home--only both of them never made it. Weeks later when the charred body of a female is discovered, the Carter family is left to implode from guilt and tension. Faced with a fruitless police investigation, Mason decides to take matters into his own hands. He soon finds himself thrust waist-deep into long-kept secrets that alter his outlook on the world he thought he knew. With shady characters around every corner, Mason gambles his trust and his life in order to find answers to the ever-increasing questions surrounding his sister's case. When the truth finally begins unravelling, it coils around him like a snake and threatens everything he knows. Small-town thrillers take on a new form when the lines between right and wrong don't exist.
#motivo_ia: Mason Carter investiga asesinato de su hermana; thriller en pueblo pequeño.

title: Death Among Fitful Shadows
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller
comments: Victoria Sedgewick’s acceptance of a private case for a wealthy lady leads her into deeper danger than she ever imagined. But it isn’t only her own life at peril...  When her infant son is drawn into the dangerous game, Victoria enlists the help of Branwell Keats. Together, the pair must risk everything to win at all costs.
#motivo_ia: Misterio histórico victoriano con investigación privada.

title: Death Under Wrathful Skies
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller
comments: A vicious killer haunts the streets of London and has selected a member of Victoria Sedgewick’s household as his next victim. Still reeling from recent revelations surrounding her late husband’s murder, can Victoria identify this new killer before he claims another life?  The inquiry agent hired by her in-laws still delves into the Sedgewick family secrets, but when violence strikes close to home, Victoria must take matters into her own hands.
#motivo_ia: Asesino en Londres, misterio victoriano.

title: Death Beneath a Troubled Roof
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller
comments: When the sudden illness of her father-in-law pulls Victoria Sedgewick away from London, she finds herself at the gloomy Yorkshire estate of her late husband’s family. There she discovers that her relations are in danger from a bitter darkness that threatens to engulf them all.  With the help of Branwell Keats, Victoria investigates a plot as dramatic and haunting as the isolated landscape...
#motivo_ia: Investigación en una finca victoriana.

title: Close to Memories
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller, Representacion · Protagonista femenina fuerte, Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: After being suspended from the case she was leading, Harper starts independently searching for evidence, wading through secrets and lies to solve this mystery. With the unsolved disappearance of Beth and Gina, she risks being put off the case entirely if caught.  When a suspect abruptly confesses to killing his own daughter, with no reason why, Harper gets suspicious. She now has to act fast before the actual perpetrator behind the disappearances strikes again.  B.P Stevens kidnapping thrillers are perfect if you are trying to find police books with conclusions you didn't see coming!
#motivo_ia: Continuación del caso Shadow Man; Harper suspendida, investiga por su cuenta.

title: Last Stand
tags: Ambientacion · Small town, Subgenero · Policiaco/Detective
comments: Belton County detective tags along with high school genius, Ian Brown, to find the kidnapped Dennis Walker and expose the secrets of corruption that run deep in Belton County.  Ashley and Ian make one last stand in the final book of the Curious series in this small-town thriller. The mission: No matter the cost, save Dennis Walker. Ashley and Caleb attempt to take on Chester Labs without the help of Belton Police. But with Max and the Chester Labs security team waiting, the duo has no chance of winning.  Ian, Badrah, and Lincoln join the fray after discovering a secret message from Mr. Walker himself, and they risk everything to save their beloved teacher. But with no one coming to help, a bunch of kids can only do so much.  Ashley and Ian risk their careers and lives in the final book of this police procedural series to save Dennis Walker and eliminate corruption in Belton police.

title: A Lie of Omission
tags: Genero · Misterio/Thriller, Subgenero · Thriller psicologico
comments:
"It had me hooked from the start. . . It's a cracking read" - Patricia Gibney   
'Fans of Jo Spain and Sam Blake will love this.' Danger, secrets and new beginnings lurk in the hills of rural Ireland. Retired Detective Thomas Tegan has returned home. He has embraced his childhood nickname, Trout, is enjoying getting to know his sister’s best friend Lauren and is toying with the idea of setting up a wine-importing business. But …   
It isn’t easy to switch off finely honed investigative skills nor, as he soon discovers, does he want to. When a hike in the local hills with Lauren leads them to the body of a young man, whom he knew from his days on the force, he resolves to make sure the perpetrators are brought to justice. Except …   
As a retired detective, Tegan has no authority to investigate. He enlists Lauren’s help and together they set up TLCI, a Private Investigation Agency. However …   
Thomas Tegan has an agenda of his own that he can’t share with Lauren. And his presence in her life endangers her. Not to mention that his secret has the potential to destroy the relationship evolving from their friendship …

title: Bed and Breakfast and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: A Poo Poo Kind of Morning  I tried not to look down the mouth of hell staring back at me from inside the glaringly pristine outer ceramic shell of the white throne, my throat catching, stomach doing half flips and a rather impressive rollover routine that would have gotten at least a 9.5 even from the Russian judges. Instead, I forced myself to smile and swallow and remind myself the elbow length yellow rubber gloves grasping the handle of the standard issue plunger were all that stood between me and Pooageddon.  Suck it up, Fee. Big girl panties and adulting and all that.  “At what point,” I waved the dripping plunger, wincing as droplets of yuck flew, “did I think owning a bed and breakfast was going to be glamorous and romantic?”  Fiona Fleming hasn’t lived in Reading, Vermont in over a decade, her escape from small town living leading her to New York City and a life of adventure. An adventure that has left her with no career, an ex who cheated on her and zero plans for the future. Her grandmother’s death grants her a new chance—inheriting Petunia’s, Iris Fleming’s bed and breakfast, seems like the ideal fresh start. But when Fee finds out ownership of the property Iris willed her might be in question, she’s drawn into the seedy underbelly of the cutest town in America after being singled out as the main suspect in a murder.
#motivo_ia: Primera entrega de la serie, misterio de asesinato en un bed and breakfast.

title: Chocolate Hearts and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: A Multiple Drink Kind of Night  Why was it fancy Valentine’s Day drinks were always tinted red? Reminded me more of gore and mayhem than anything to do with romance. Which said a lot, I suppose, for my state of mind when it came to relationships and dating.  No bitterness in Fiona Fleming toward the opposite sex or anything.  I sipped carefully at the mimosa the bartender smilingly handed me and shrugged off the sweetness. It had alcohol in it, so I guess it would do. A few of these and I might even find a way to enjoy myself tonight. Yeah, right.  Fiona Fleming would rather be home, at her bed and breakfast with her pug Petunia snuggled up to her while everyone else celebrates Valentine’s Day without her, thank you very much. Instead, she’s been recruited to attend another of Mayor Olivia Walker’s Reading, Vermont tourism promotion events. But when the young majority stakeholder in the White Valley Ski Lodge ends up dead, she’s ready and willing to help Sheriff Crew Turner and her father uncover who killed their victim while a snowstorm cuts them off from the rest of the world.
#motivo_ia: Misterio durante celebración de San Valentín con tormenta de nieve.

title: Fame and Fortune and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: An Insulting Kind of Day  I skipped around a small stack of pylons while my deputy cousin unloaded more of the same from the back of the sheriff’s pickup. I beamed at Robert Carlisle, not because I adored him. Quite the opposite. I couldn’t stand the wretched little piece of loathing with his seventies-esque bush of a black mustache or his pompous superiority that he got to be a cop and I didn’t or his growing beer belly and hideous leer he liked to aim at any woman under the age of fifty.  No, I grinned and waved out of sheer delight at his less than enthusiastic expression as he grunted his way through hefting a rather heavy looking barricade onto the sidewalk.  “Exercise is good for you,” I said as I kept going without offering to help.  “Your ass could use some lately, Fanny,” he shot after me.  He did not just call me fat and Fanny in the same sentence.  Fiona Fleming has no intention of getting involved when Mayor Olivia Walker hosts a parade for the celebrity couple whose fame she’s been using to promote their town. But when the local ski lodge can’t accommodate and Willow Pink and Skip Anderson end up staying at Petunia’s, Fee is not only front row center to a murder, she’s trapped in her own bed and breakfast with the suspects when the frenzied media descends on Reading looking for the story of a lifetime.
#motivo_ia: Misterio con celebridades alojadas en la posada y un asesinato.

title: Ganache and Fondant and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: **A fifth cozy mystery installment to die for!**   *Not to be indelicate about it, but if Mom made me eat one more bite of cake, I was going to throw up. I'd honestly ingested enough dessert in the last hour to sink a submarine with no end in sight.  Don't get me wrong. I loved my mother's baking. But a girl has her limits, and I had finally reached mine, groaning, burping softly around the chocolate, vanilla, red velvet, buttercream and banana that swam on the surface of a variety of other flavors I'd rather not taste again in reverse. ** *With renovations of the new annex to Petunia's in full swing, Fiona's life might be more in order, but her habit of digging into criminal cases hasn't changed one bit. Doesn't help when her mother is on the suspect list, the death of a famous cooking show judge leading Fee into the dark side of bake offs, television and murder.  **Don't miss a single volume in the Fiona Fleming Cozy Mysteries! title: Ropes and Trees and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: A sixth cozy mystery installment to die for!  A Dangling Kind of Minute  "Have dinner with me tonight." The gruffness of Crew's voice made me shiver all over, especially when he didn't move after speaking, mouth grazing over my earlobe, faint trace of his teeth nibbling at the edge. He was lucky we were thirty feet up on a narrow platform because had we been on the ground? He'd have been at risk of a hard landing and some rather private activity that may or may not have ended in the pair of us getting arrested.  Seriously. Yum.  Now that the annex is ready to open and her romance with Crew is budding with spring, Fee prepares for the wedding of the year while trying to balance her mother's continuing self-confidence issues and her own rapidly expanding business. An afternoon of zip lining at a new park seems like a great way to let off some steam--until an activist protesting the park is found murdered. Once again in the middle of a murder investigation, Fee finds working with Crew instead of against him puts her in more danger than ever!  Don't miss a single volume in the Fiona Fleming Cozy Mysteries! Find books one through five available    Bed and Breakfast and Murder   Chocolate Hearts and Murder   Fame and Fortune and Murder   Ghosts and Goblins and Murder   Ganache and Fondant and Murder
#motivo_ia: Misterio en parque de tirolinas, tono cozy.

title: Anchors Away and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: A seventh cozy mystery installment to die for!  A Crew-less Kind of Week  “Good morning, Sheriff. How’s Montpelier?” He and Jill were at a conference in the state capital, gone since last Sunday night. He’d been great to keep in touch, calling when he knew I’d be alone, usually about this time of day and again late enough at night we had lots of time to talk. Did he really know me that well, my schedule? Apparently. Made me feel a happy little bubble of joy, like we were really a couple. Weren’t we?  “Good morning, Miss Fleming,” he said in that deep gravel voice of his that made me shiver and grin all over again. “I’m bored silly, ready to come home tomorrow and wishing you’d come with me instead of Jill.”  Well, growl, Sheriff Turner.  With Petunia’s and the annex packed to the brim, Fee’s business is booming. When the yacht club’s president dies under mysterious circumstances, she discovers her bed and breakfast isn’t her only source of employment. Newly partnered with her father in Fleming Investigations, Fee reaches out to Crew to come home and solve the case. Trouble is, he’s vanished and no one will tell her where he’s gone. Worst of all? That leaves Robert, of all people, sitting in the sheriff’s seat to head butt with Fee and John with Olivia’s job again in the balance. (PLEASE The choice of AWAY instead of AWEIGH in the title is intentional!)
#motivo_ia: Misterio en el club de yates con desaparición del sheriff.

title: Guns and Ammo and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: An anxious kind of month  “Any new threats against you?” Pamela seemed eager for my answer while I tsked at her.  “Are you actually asking me if I’ve had any further nasty messages left in my mailbox?” There’d been more than a few since she’d gleefully published my first column. I figured there’d be pushback, but threatening to hurt my dog, my business and my koi? Unacceptable. And while Crew seemed to think none of the threats were real, he was still worried, though he never once asked me to stop writing because he was a smart, smart boy.  Tensions are high as a pending election pits incumbent mayor Olivia Walker against Patterson lackey Geoffrey Jenkins, threatening Crew’s job as sheriff and his place in Reading. Fee and her mother, meanwhile, agree to assist the owner of a new hunting retreat with the first batch of guests. To their horror, not only are they cut off from the rest of Reading by an accidental beaver dam demolition, they are forced to investigate a murder while Fee wrestles with her past and the fact she’s still not over her ex.  Don't miss a single volume in the Fiona Fleming Cozy Mysteries! title: Runways and High Heels and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: An empowering kind of moment I had no idea hitting someone could be so emotionally satisfying. Not that I condoned violence on a regular basis, but I did happen to be known for my temper. Still, I usually took the pacifist route on the outside, if I tended to boil over on the inside. This opportunity to actually use my fists to strike out at another human being had much more appeal than I should have allowed myself. And the tight grin and panting half-hiccup, half giggle that escaped me every time I punched Matt honestly had to go. Self-defense class was fun, yo. Fee and Crew have fallen into a delightful romance while Reading’s continuing popularity keeps her busy at work. When a fashion show comes to town, Fee finds herself hosting Vivian French’s favorite designer at Petunia’s, along with the drama that entails. But when one of the elite ends up dead, it’s the drama between her loved ones that gets Fee the most riled up while she does her best to solve yet another murder. title: Plaid and Fore! And Murder

comments: A mulligan kind of instant “Sorry about the whole clandestine next state over photo adventure,” Crew said. “It’s not like anyone else is looking since those treasure hunters debunked the idea.” I remembered Olivia’s disappointment, how she’d invested so much time and effort into the Captain Reading branding. If only she knew… Daisy made a noise, a choking, nervous sound that made me sigh. “Day,” I said, voice low and doing my best not to feel disappointed despite knowing what she was about to say. “It’s okay. Just tell us.” She met my eyes, her gray ones huge, while Crew waited, photos limp in his hands but zero judgment on his face, either. “I’m sorry,” she whispered, head hanging now. “It’s not just us. I told Rose everything.” When a golf pro falls victim to murder during a tournament hosted at the White Valley Golf and Country Club, Fee finds herself embroiled in the mystery while the hunt for the Reading hoard heats up and secrets behind the disappearance of Fiona Doyle are finally revealed. title: Whips and Spurs and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: An epic kind of year There were times when I made truly bad choices in life, moments when I knew better but I just couldn’t seem to help myself. You know what I mean, right? How logic and common sense seem to diverge with the powerful urge to act despite the innate understanding such actions will likely get you into a world of trouble and may not, in the end, be worth it? And, despite knowing all that, no matter how much you work to convince yourself some things are better left undone, let go, abandoned you just can’t seem to allow yourself the freedom to be a good, normal person and simply mind your own business. Wait. Was that just me? Sigh. Yeah. Just me. Okay then. Fiona Fleming’s plans to sneak into the exclusive Patterson wedding are interrupted when she stumbles on yet another body. With Crew out of town and the sheriff’s department short staffed, Fee finds herself investigating alongside his former FBI partner, Elizabeth Michaud. title: Something Borrowed, Something Blue and Murder
tags: Genero · Fantasia, Paranormal · Brujas/Magos, Tono · Cozy/Ligero
comments: **An old kind of new** Crew closed the distance between us, my head suddenly tucked under his chin, hands pressing me to him, rocking me gently, softly while he whispered my name in my ear. “Fee, I love you. I stayed for you, from the first time we met. I knew it was you.”Damn it, Crew Turner. Stop that right now. He turned me slightly, still holding me, and went on. “For better or worse, this place is home, now.” He nodded to Vivian who nodded back. “No matter what happens, I guess I’m about to become a Fleming.” I laughed at that through my tears, while Dad chuckled and Mom tsked. But, knowing Reading? That was exactly what everyone would think.Poor Crew.With a fresh death in none other than her beloved Petunia’s, and her wedding hanging in the balance, Fee must accept a role she never expected while doing her best to catch a murderer, all while realizing there’s a very good chance someone has it out for her…
#motivo_ia: Boda y asesinato en Petunia's, tono cozy.

title: All in and Death
